name: Hybrid Analysis
description: Hybrid Analysis (Falcon Sandbox) is a free malware analysis service powered by CrowdStrike that provides automated static and dynamic analysis of files and URLs in sandbox environments. It detects malicious behavior, extracts IOCs, and provides detailed threat reports.

actions.name: Search Hash
actions.description: Search for analysis reports by file hash (MD5, SHA1, SHA256, or SHA512). Converts the hash to SHA256 and returns all associated sandbox reports.

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: File hash to search for (MD5, SHA1, SHA256, or SHA512)

actions.name: Search Terms
actions.description: Search the Hybrid Analysis database using multiple criteria including filename, filetype, verdict, AV detection results, tags, country, domain, and date ranges.

parameters.name: av_detect
parameters.description: Filter by AV detection percentage range (e.g., '50-100')

actions.name: Get Report Summary
actions.description: Retrieve a summary of a specific sandbox analysis report including verdict, threat score, signatures, extracted IOCs, network activity, and process behavior.

actions.name: Get File Overview
actions.description: Retrieve an overview summary for a file by its SHA256 hash, aggregating results from all sandbox runs and AV detections.

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: The SHA256 hash of the file

actions.name: Submit File
actions.description: Submit a file for sandbox analysis. The file will be detonated in the specified environment and a detailed behavior report will be generated.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to submit for analysis (multipart/form-data)

parameters.name: no_share_third_party
parameters.description: Prevent sharing with third-party security vendors (default: false)

parameters.name: allow_community_access
parameters.description: Allow community access to the report (default: true)

actions.name: Submit URL
actions.description: Submit a URL for sandbox analysis. The URL will be visited in a sandbox environment and all network and behavioral activity will be recorded.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL to submit for analysis

parameters.name: no_share_third_party
parameters.description: Prevent sharing with third-party security vendors (default: false)

actions.name: Get Report State
actions.description: Check the processing state of a submitted analysis to determine if it is queued, in progress, or completed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The report ID to check state for

actions.name: List Environments
actions.description: Retrieve a list of available sandbox environments with their IDs, operating systems, and architecture details.
